summary: A male subject is observed performing a manual system test in front of camera CAM-001.
detailed_description: The surveillance footage captures a young male with short dark hair and eyeglasses wearing a white sleeveless shirt. He is positioned close to the camera, looking directly into the lens, and concludes the sequence by waving his right hand. This activity is consistent with the recorded event type of a manual system check or test.
recommended_actions: Archive footage as part of system maintenance logs
